description: Yoga Nidra for deep rest, connection, nervous system healing, and better sleep. Welcome dear one, I'm Kristyn Rose. This channel offers guided Yoga Nidra, nervous system regulation practices, and mindfulness tools to help you find deep rest, emotional balance, nervous system regulation, healing, mindfulness, and connection to yourself.
